message:
feat(codegen): Add AST-to-bytecode compiler for eval()/exec()

Implements full AST compiler bridging metal0 parser and bytecode VM:

- Statement compilation: assign, aug_assign, if, while, for, function_def,
  return, break, continue, raise, try/except, import, class_def, del, assert, with
- Expression compilation: constants, names, binop, unaryop, compare,
  boolop, call, attribute, subscript, list, tuple, dict, set,
  if_expr, lambda, listcomp, await
- Proper scope handling with local/global variable resolution
- Loop context for break/continue with jump patching
- Explicit CompileError type to break recursive error set inference
- BytecodeProgram serialize() method for subprocess communication
- Updated eval.zig to use new BytecodeProgram structure

The compiler generates bytecode for the runtime VM with 65 opcodes,
enabling dynamic Python execution via eval()/exec().
